headlines.headline: Stephen A. has some words for LeBron over MJ GOAT debate
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to LeBron James' take on the GOAT debate between himself and Michael Jordan.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA draft lottery simulator: Play out the 14-team field
headlines.description: ESPN Analytics has released a 2026 NBA draft lottery simulator, which allows users to model the 14-team field and play out the lottery.

headlines.headline: AJ Dybantsa upgrades from NIL deal to pro partnership with Nike
headlines.description: As AJ Dybantsa is transitioning from college to prepare for the NBA draft, he is also taking the next step in his endorsement deal with Nike. Dybantsa, who signed a NIL deal with Nike in 2024, is extending that agreement as pro basketball contract.

headlines.headline: The 2026 NFL Draft was historic, for Africa and the league's international programme

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Ranking the 100 best picks, steals, fits

headlines.headline: Senators' Brady Tkachuk: 'Fully committed' despite trade talk
headlines.description: Senators captain Brady Tkachuk said Wednesday that the constant trade rumors became "a distraction," and that he's "been fully committed to this team."
